name: messages.list
description: List messages in a conversation with pagination. Optionally filter by parent message for thread replies.

conversation_id.description: Conversation ID to list messages from (required)

parent_id.description: Optional parent message ID to list thread replies only

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return

offset.description: Number of messages to skip for pagination
